name: MoveEquipmentWithinHome
description: I want to move equipment within my home

sampleUtterances.utterance: Can you help me relocate the broadband hub in my house?
Can you install the hub in my bedroom instead of the living room?
change location of my equipment
Could you move my router to a different wall?
Could you shift my Wi-Fi hub to a new corner of the same room?
How can I have my modem wired into a more central location?
How can I transfer my router setup to a different room?
How do I arrange for an engineer to relocate my broadband equipment?
I need to move my modem closer to my TV
I need to move my socket due to poor Wi-Fi performance
I want the equipment moved closer to where I use my computer
I want the socket moved from one wall to another
I want to move my router to another room
I would like my broadband box relocated for better coverage
I’d like to move the internet box to a different spot for better reception
I’d like to relocate the cable point to the other side of the room
I’m having connection issues—can you help me move the hub?
I’m unhappy with the router’s placement—can I move it?
Is it possible to reposition the internet box near the window?
moving wifi box to a different room
Please reposition my wall socket to another area of the living room
The current location isn’t ideal—I’d like to move my router
